basisApprovalText: Option B approved: aligned Cash Flow preview is accepted as finance basis candidate under Q4=A, Q5=C, Q7=B. DIN CHINA and DIN BRIDAL deltas are accepted as expected rule differences vs legacy. Official legacy Cash Flow remains unchanged. Cash Flow loader swap is NOT APPROVED.

companies.deltaExplanation: Expected rule difference under Option B — Q5=C excludes 169 internal transfer rows from aligned preview normal totals; legacy still gross-presents transfers as period cash-in/out.
Expected rule difference under Option B — Q4=A excludes 2 opening-balance rows from aligned preview period cash-in; legacy still counts opening/JE as period cash-in.
Zero-diff — aligned preview matches legacy at summary; supports review confidence.

importantWording: This sign-off approves aligned preview as finance basis candidate only.
This does not approve loader swap.
This does not change official legacy Cash Flow.
This does not approve R7/R8/next company.
